summary: Performance fix testing complete. All issues resolved: (1) Inventory table alignment fixed - 10 headers match 10 data columns, (2) All account selector pages load instantly without freezing - Voucher Entry, Cr/Db Notes, Sales Invoices, Purchase Invoices. Backend API endpoints with search optimization working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance fix verified. Inventory table has 10 columns properly aligned (IMAGE, CODE, NAME, CATEGORY, SUPPLIER, COST, PRICE, ON HAND, TAX, ACTIONS). All pages with account selectors (Voucher Entry, Cr/Db Notes, Sales Invoices, Purchase Invoices) load in <10 seconds. API endpoints (/api/accounts/movable/list, /api/customer-accounts, /api/supplier-accounts, /api/sales-accounts, /api/purchase-accounts) all respond within 5 seconds with search parameters.
